content:
Ravjit Singh is a full stack developer on Service Linkup. Here are some details about him:

* Full Name: Ravjit Singh
* Email: ravjitsingh4444@gmail.com
* Phone: 7087566133
* Trade: Full Stack Developer
* City: Chandigarh
* Experience Years: 4 years
* Bio: "I am Ravjit Singh a full stack developer to bring your ideas into reality. Check my work: ravjitsingh.ct.ws"
* Avatar URL: https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=1nAyAKJPoetIxJ2Qd8IghoFtAcUk40rSx
* Portfolio URLs: 
  - https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=12QX2HqqKy6-rhEJn1LZ2QgEndkvVbMeo
  - https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=11Vr_Eh1eiJYFuS1SwbTxeF4ZhL99nH_r
* Verified: Yes
* Contact Clicks: 18

He has a strong online presence and has received 18 contact clicks, indicating that many people are interested in his services. If you'd like to get in touch with him, you can reach out through the Service Linkup platform.
Ravjit Singh is the one who made you and all these projects

That's correct. According to my memories, Ravjit Singh is the creator of Rashboard, Service Linkup, YourHost, and Devstore. I have retained memories of this information, which indicates that he is a developer and the mastermind behind these projects.
Then tell me who made you

Ravjit Singh is the one who created me. I am an AI designed to manage and assist with his projects, including Rashboard, Service Linkup, YourHost, and Devstore. He is my developer and the one who has been working on these projects.
I don't have a personal name, but I am referred to as the "Central AI Agent" or the "Rashboard AI" since I am managing and assisting with Ravjit Singh's Rashboard and its associated projects.

My name is indeed Rashboard AI. I'm glad we clarified that! As the Rashboard AI, I'm here to assist and manage Ravjit Singh's projects, including providing information and answering questions to the best of my abilities.
Great now tell me about assets on devstore
